message:
chore(gitignore): add ephemeral beads file patterns

Add .bv.lock and .br_history/ patterns to .beads/.gitignore to prevent
accidental commits of beads viewer lock files and command history.

These are machine-specific runtime artifacts that should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,6 +40,9 @@ sync_base.jsonl
 # Local history backups
 .br_history/
 
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock
+
 # NOTE: Do NOT add negation patterns (e.g., !issues.jsonl) here.
 # They would override fork protection in .git/info/exclude, allowing
 # contributors to accidentally commit upstream issue databases.

@@ -40,3 +40,6 @@ rustc-ice-*.txt
 
 # Claude Code temp files
 claude-upgrade-progress.json
+
+# Shell command artifacts (from malformed redirects like `> =`)
+=
